name: @forgeax/hello-animation-graph
description: Fox.glb AnimationGraph DAG demo (feat-20260713-animation-state-machine-plugin M5). createApp + defineAnimationGraph Add(base=Blend(Survey,Blend(Walk,Run)),additive=overlay@0.3). Keyboard drives nodeWeights parameters -- evaluateAnimationGraph auto-computes weights[] each frame (AC-13). HUD shows per-node effective weights + final N-slot weights[] sum > 1 when overlay is on.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle shape downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime already tracked at package level

fps.reason: hello-animation-graph smoke covers DAG numerical correctness gate (AC-13); fps not a primary metric for this demo

bench.reason: convergence integration app; bench focus on @forgeax/engine-math + @forgeax/engine-ecs

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; animation-graph pipeline ships per-feature
